audit_items.proof_trace: The guard `if (assetParams.decimals == 0) { continue; }` at L234-236 is placed as the first conditional inside the loop body, before any price query or arithmetic using decimals. All subsequent computations at L248 and L258 that divide by `10 ** assetParams.decimals` are unreachable when decimals == 0; no alternative path in the loop bypasses this guard.
